Title: King, J. Cathart
Overview: architectural history; extensive documentation of castle architecture and surrounds
Selected Bibliography: Castellanum anglicanum. An Index and Bibliography of the Castles of England Wales and the Islands. 2 vols. New York, London, 1983.
Sources: Bazin, Germain. Histoire de l'histoire de l'art; de Vasari à nos jours. Paris: Albin Michel, 1986 p. 514
Archives: • Papers of D.J. Cathcart King, University of Bristol Special Collections. https://archiveshub.jisc.ac.uk/data/gb3-dm1388, GB 3 DM 1388.
